subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you again! I’d be happy to set up a formal meeting to explore how we might work together.

I’d suggest the following slots for a 30-minute call:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Let me know which day suits you best and I’ll get something on the calendar.

As for the direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I’m not able to share internal personnel information. The best approach would be through me or your existing contacts at the company, and I’m happy to help facilitate the right conversations once we’ve had our initial discussion.

Looking forward to reconnecting!

Best regards
